name: Angel Hair with Avocado Corn Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chicken stock, boiling, more as needed
1 cup corn kernels, from two ears of corn
1 pound angel hair pasta, cooked al dente
1/2 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine two cups of boiling chicken stock with corn kernels from two ears of corn.
2. Add avocado, chopped chives, lemon juice, parboiled tomatillos, seeded jalapeno, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Blend until smooth, adding more stock as needed up to three cups total.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
5. Pour the sauce into a saucepan and simmer, stirring frequently.
6. Cook the angel hair pasta al dente according to package instructions.
7. Drain the pasta and pour the sauce over it, tossing to combine.
8. Serve with freshly grated Parmesan cheese on top.
